zh.lifeSummary: John Cartwright是William L Cartwright和Mary的兒子，於1770年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿黑斯特。他於大約1790年與Elizabeth Mears在美國北卡羅來納州吉爾福特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1848年1月22日在美國印第安納州尤尼恩尤尼恩 堂史普享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cartwright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Gathright
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Cartwright  .

variants.name: Cartright
meanings: Probably also a variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Courtright
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch Kortrijk: habitational name from the city of Kortrijk in Flanders, in French known as Courtrai. Compare Cartwright , Cortright , Courtwright , Curtright , Cutright , and Kortright .
Perhaps also an altered form of English   Cartwright  .

History: The progenitors of the (majority of the) Courtrights (and Cortrights, Kortrights, etc.) were the brothers Jan and Michiel Bastiansen van Kortryk from Leerdam in the Netherlands, who arrived with their families to New Amsterdam in New Netherland (now New York City, NY) in 1663. The descendants of one or another brother also bear the surnames Kortright, Kortwright, Cortright, Co(u)rtwright, Cartwright, and Cu(r)tright.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.description: "Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
Bill of Rights guarantees individual freedom.

historicEvents.title: The Bill of Rights
historicEvents.description: After the Constitution was made, some objections were raised by Anti-Federalists. So, in response ten amendments were discussed and voted on to become The Bill of Rights. These rights were made to clarify and guarantee certain freedoms of residents of the country.
War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.
Historical Boundaries 1826: Union, Indiana, United States

historicEvents.title: The Black Hawk War
historicEvents.description: Convinced that a group of Native American tribes were hostile, The United States formed a frontier militia to stop them in their tracks. Even though Black Hawk was hoping to avoid bloodshed while trying to resettle on tribal land, U.S. officials opened fire on the Native Americans. Black Hawk then responded to this confrontation by successfully attacking the militia at the Battle of Stillman's Run and then left northward. After a few months the militia caught up with Black Hawk and his men and defeated them at the Battle of Wisconsin Heights. While being weakened by hunger, injuries and desertion, Black Hawk and the rest of the many native survivors retreated towards the Mississippi. Unfortunately, Black Hawk and other leaders were later captured when they surrendered to the US forces and were then imprisoned for a year.

historicEvents.title: The Massive Internal Improvements Act
historicEvents.description: The Massive Internal Improvements Act of 1836 loaned Indiana $10,000,000 to create infrastructure such as canals, railroads, and roads across the state. The act was signed by Whig Governor Noah Noble and passed by the Indiana General Assembly. However, the financial crisis known as the Panic of 1837 thwarted these plans as costs ballooned. Construction on the infrastructure was not completed and the state debt rapidly increased.

en.lifeSummary: John Cartwright was born in 1770, in Amherst, Virginia, British Colonial America as the son of William L Cartwright and Mary. He married Elizabeth Mears about 1790, in Guilford, North Carolina, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 22 January 1848, in Union Township, Union, Indiana, United States, at the age of 78.

Il est décédé le 22 janvier 1848, à Union Township, Union, Indiana, États-Unis, à l’âge de 78 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cartwrightは1770年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州アマーストでWilliam L CartwrightとMaryの息子として生まれた。約1790年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州グイルフォードでElizabeth Mearsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1848年1月22日にアメリカ合衆国インディアナ州ウニオンウニオン トウンシュイップで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cartwright(은)는 1770년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 아헤르스트에서 William L Cartwright(와)과 Mary의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1790년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 길퍼드에서 Elizabeth Mears(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1848년 1월 22일 미국 인디애나 주 유니언 유니언 타운시프에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: John Cartwright родился в 1770 г. в местности амхирст, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. Его родителей звали William L Cartwright и Mary. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mears около 1790 г. в местности гуилфорд, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 января 1848 г. в местности унион тоуншип, унион, Индиана, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 78 лет.
